samples.claim: **Cloud computing** is the on-demand delivery of IT resources over the internet with pay-as-you-go pricing, as defined in the Cloud computing Wikipedia article.
- **Infrastructure as a Service (IaaS)** — provides virtualized computing resources over the internet, documented in Infrastructure as a service
- **Platform as a Service (PaaS)** — delivers hardware and software tools to develop applications, covered in Platform as a service
- **Software as a Service (SaaS)** — provides ready-to-use software applications, explained in Software as a service
